title: In Perfect Peace

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: In the silence of my questioning
When doubt clouds my way
You are the light that answers me
In the fading of the day

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: How long will shadows blind your hearts?
How long chase empty dreams?
While truth stands waiting at your door
Nothing is as it seems

sections.label: Chorus
lines: In perfect peace, I'll rest my head
Though storms may rage outside
For you alone can make me dwell
In safety, where you guide

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Know that grace has set apart
Those who seek the light
In my distress, I call your name
You guard me through the night

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Though others chase their fortunes wild
Seeking gold and fame
Let your face shine upon my path
I'll praise your holy name

sections.label: Chorus
lines: In perfect peace, I'll rest my head
Though storms may rage outside
For you alone can make me dwell
In safety, where you guide

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: More than autumn's harvest gold
More than spring's sweet wine
My heart is full of quiet joy
Knowing peace divine

sections.label: Outro
lines: So I will lay me down to sleep
In your unfailing care
For in the darkness or the light
I know that you are there

epigraph: only makest me dwell in safety
